# polymarket_tags (Data Source)

Lists Polymarket category tags, which are used to classify markets and events. Supports pagination.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List the first 20 category tags.
data "polymarket_tags" "all" {
  limit = 20
}

output "tag_labels" {
  value = [for t in data.polymarket_tags.all.tags : t.label]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `limit` (Number) Maximum number of tags to return. Combine with `offset` to paginate.
- `offset` (Number) Number of tags to skip before collecting results, for pagination.

### Read-Only

- `tags` (Attributes List) List of category tags. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the tag was created.
- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the tag.
- `label` (String) Human-readable label of the tag.
- `slug` (String) URL-friendly slug of the tag.
- `updated_at` (String) ISO-8601 timestamp at which the tag was last updated.
